== INPUT OIDC claims (from tiny-idp) ==
{
  "email": "alice@example.test",
  "email_verified": true,
  "groups": [
    "inbox-users"
  ],
  "locale": "en-US",
  "name": "Alice Inbox",
  "preferred_username": "alice",
  "roles": [
    "writer"
  ],
  "sub": "user-alice-fixed",
  "tenant": "personal"
}

== OUTPUT Jitsi JWT (HS256, what Prosody validates) ==
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..Sn1MIc2BHdm-x1VDPzRgiffawWbRszRPzx3xv_kQMaU

== decoded Jitsi payload ==
{
  "aud": "jitsi",
  "context": {
    "user": {
      "avatar": "",
      "email": "alice@example.test",
      "id": "user-alice-fixed",
      "moderator": "true",
      "name": "Alice Inbox"
    }
  },
  "exp": 1783625162,
  "iat": 1783614362,
  "iss": "jitsi",
  "nbf": 1783614362,
  "room": "standup",
  "sub": "personal"
}

Jitsi joins via:  https://<jitsi-host>/standup?jwt=<jwt>
